focus: Close the remaining P1 graph-metadata, reconsolidation, skill-advisor, and save-validation clusters, then open the first P2 batch on bridge-era coverage and legacy-parser complaints.

graphEvents.detail: Seven graph-metadata laundering + packet-search findings moved to ADDRESSED via the phase-016 P0-C composite (1bdd1ed03) and the current migrated-marker parser contract in graph-metadata-parser.ts.
Four reconsolidation complement/duplicate-window findings moved to ADDRESSED via transactional reconsolidation with predecessor CAS and complement-window closure (104f534bd0).

Two skill-advisor routing prefix-collapse findings moved to ADDRESSED via the T-SAP-01/S4/phrase-booster chain (b28522bea7, e009eda0c4, 678bd9bf52), while two metadata-loader silent-discard findings moved from UNVERIFIED to STILL_OPEN because corrupt source graph metadata is still skipped fail-open.

The first deliberate P2 batch moved fifteen bridge-era, legacy-parser, and removed-surface complaints to SUPERSEDED; one live whitespace-only trigger-quality gap remains STILL_OPEN and the residual UNVERIFIED backlog dropped from 18 to 13.
